summary: The page has a perfect performance score, with all metrics meeting the recommended thresholds.

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted.
findings.evidence: LCP: 0.9 s mobile / 0.2 s desktop; budget 2.5 s

findings.title: Cumulative Layout Shift
findings.description: Cumulative Layout Shift measures the movement of visible elements within the viewport.

findings.title: Total Blocking Time
findings.description: Sum of all time periods between FCP and Time to Interactive, when task length exceeded 50ms, expressed in milliseconds.
findings.evidence: TBT: 50 ms mobile / 0 ms desktop; budget 200 ms
